data.summary: Detected 2 intents. Generated text summary for revenue and staged task.

closingText.text:
Here's what I found for Acme Corp this quarter:

Q2 revenue is at $148,350 across 23 orders, averaging $6,450 per order. Revenue is up 12.4% compared to Q1, though the average order value has dipped slightly (down 3.1%). Weekly performance peaked in Week 3 of April at $31,400.

I've also staged a follow-up task:
• Title: Follow up with Acme Corp
• Type: Follow Up
• Priority: Medium
• Assigned to: Heman Bhullar
• Due: May 1, 2026

Would you like me to create this task, or would you prefer to adjust anything?
